# Tank Documentation for LLMs

Tank is a security-first package manager for AI agent skills. This file indexes the canonical docs pages.

## Canonical Docs Index
- [Welcome to Tank](https://tankpkg.dev/docs) - Security-first package manager for AI agent skills
- [Getting Started](https://tankpkg.dev/docs/getting-started) - Set up your environment and start using Tank
- [Publishing Skills](https://tankpkg.dev/docs/publishing) - Learn how to publish skills to the Tank registry
- [Installing Skills](https://tankpkg.dev/docs/installing) - Learn how to install and manage skills from the Tank registry
- [CLI Reference](https://tankpkg.dev/docs/cli) - Complete reference for all Tank CLI commands
- [API Reference](https://tankpkg.dev/docs/api) - Complete reference for the Tank REST API
- [Self-Hosting](https://tankpkg.dev/docs/self-hosting) - Learn how to host your own Tank registry

## Important Paths
- Main docs landing: https://tankpkg.dev/docs
- API reference: https://tankpkg.dev/docs/api
- CLI reference: https://tankpkg.dev/docs/cli
- Self hosting: https://tankpkg.dev/docs/self-hosting
